name: Metal Entryway Organizer Matte Black - Brightroom™: Wall Mounted Coat Rack & Keys Holder with 4 Hooks
description:
Keep your entryway neatly organized with this Metal Entryway Organizer from Brightroom™. Featuring a wall-mounted design for space-efficient storage, this entryway organizer features four hooks for hanging anything from your keys, lanyards, hats, bags, purses or coats, while a single cubby offers you space to stash your mail and more. Maid from metal, it features a matte black finish and a sleek design for minimalist flair.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
